recommendation.recommendation: Set daily frame count alert range to [18000, 30000] frames/day. Values outside this window (excluding known partial capture days) warrant investigation.
recommendation.basis: Based on 37 stable days: mean=23566.2, stdev=4135.3.

recommendation.recommendation: Alert when cloud_response_ratio drops below 0.85. This ratio (cloud_to_proxy / box_to_proxy) below threshold indicates cloud not acknowledging box frames - likely offline/hybrid state.
recommendation.basis: Observed ratio consistently 0.85-1.05 on healthy days.

recommendation.recommendation: Exclude first partial day (2025-12-18, 4458 frames) and last stub day (2026-02-01, 2 frames) from trending baselines. These boundary days skew aggregate statistics.
recommendation.basis: Both days are clearly incomplete captures at start/end of dataset.

recommendation.recommendation: IsNewSet signal share shows week-over-week drift. Monitor setting-change frequency; a significant drop may indicate device stopped sending setting updates (firmware change or stuck state).
recommendation.basis: Drift detected in weekly IsNewSet percentage.

recommendation.recommendation: Use z-score > 2.5 on daily frame_count, conn_count, and cloud_response_ratio as real-time anomaly triggers. Current dataset provides sufficient baseline for z-score normalization.
recommendation.basis: Based on 37 stable days of data.

recommendation.recommendation: Track proxy_to_box frame ratio. When it exceeds cloud_to_proxy on a sustained basis, proxy is generating most ACKs locally (offline mode). This is expected during cloud outages but should recover.
recommendation.basis: proxy_to_box frames absent in first ~2 days, stable ~33% thereafter.
